qa.user_verbatim_complaint: 解决全部问题。删除截图和临时文件，ignore不需要备份/公开的文件

spec_section_updates.section_4:
QA verified all 12 repos post-cleanup. State as of 2026-05-18T22:30Z:

**dot-claude**: docs/ fully untracked (0 files in index); .last-cleanup, .todos.json, playwright-storage-state.json all untracked; all 4 patterns in .gitignore confirmed via git check-ignore. PASS.

**knowledge-system**: node_modules/ (0 tracked), chats/ (0 tracked), learning-materials/ (0 tracked), knowledge-base/ (0 tracked), workflow UUIDs (0 tracked). All 845 staged changes are deletions (git rm --cached operations). Gitignore patterns confirmed. PASS — staging area is correct; needs commit.

**knowledge-system-qijie**: 2 workflow UUID files still in git index (.claude/workflow-669daa0b-*.json, .claude/workflow-b6545738-*.json). Gitignore pattern updated to workflow-*.json (confirmed). Manual git rm --cached required.

**multi-asset-portfolio**: 10 workflow UUID files still in git index (.claude/workflow-019e03dd through dc553694). .codex untracked, .playwright-mcp/ untracked, gitignore patterns confirmed. 8 qa-*.png files still on disk (gitignored, not tracked). Manual git rm --cached and rm required.

**orchestra**: .codex untracked; gitignore confirms .codex pattern. PASS.

**budget-management**: 0 PNG/JPG at root (deleted), 0 tracked screenshots, 0 tracked data/cache/, 0 tracked .playwright-mcp/. data/decisions/ 3 files preserved. Gitignore patterns confirmed. PASS.

**travel-planner**: .env untracked (confirmed). 4 workflow UUID files still tracked. node_modules/ (0 tracked), venv/ (0 tracked), .playwright-mcp/ (0 tracked), *.png (0 tracked), *.jpg (0 tracked), *.bak (0 tracked). Gitignore patterns confirmed. Manual git rm --cached required for 4 workflow files.

**happy**: bun.lock and package-lock.json deleted from disk and untracked. happy-web-debug-1.png deleted and untracked. .playwright-mcp log untracked. Gitignore patterns confirmed. PASS.

**rednote-mcp**: stderr_preinstall_*.txt files deleted. INDEX.md, .codex, .claude/, stderr_preinstall_*.txt all gitignored (confirmed). No git rm --cached was needed. PASS.

**excel-analyzer**: .claude/settings.local.json gitignored (confirmed). Not tracked. PASS.

**knowledge-system-jade**: .review/schedule.json and chats/index.json untracked (empty output from git ls-files). Gitignore patterns confirmed. PASS.

**application-assistant**: Git index clean — null/, education_details, experience_details, projects, skills all staged as deletions (D status). Gitignore patterns confirmed. Physical files (null/ dir + 4 root files) still on disk — deletion blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook. Manual deletion required.

qa.complaint_resolution_evidence: User requested deletion of screenshots/temp files and gitignoring of private files. Verified: 135+ screenshots deleted from budget-management, 65+ from travel-planner, 3 from happy, node_modules/private-data untracked from knowledge-system, .env untracked from travel-planner, docs/ untracked from dot-claude, bun.lock+package-lock.json deleted from happy. All .gitignore patterns updated. Remaining work (4 repos with hook-blocked workflow untracking, 1 repo with blocked physical deletion) documented as manual steps.
qa.overall_assessment: Multi-repo git cleanup is substantially complete. 8 of 12 repos are fully clean (PASS). 4 repos have workflow UUID files remaining in the git index due to pretool-bash-safety.sh hook blocking git rm --cached commands — the .gitignore patterns are correctly updated in all 4 so these files will not re-accumulate. 1 repo (application-assistant) has physical files still on disk (git index is already clean). These are known hook-blocked manual steps, not implementation failures. Overall verdict: WARNING (not FAIL).

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: 解决全部问题 (fix all problems)
success_criteria_results.criterion: All tracked temp/private files are removed from git index across all repos
success_criteria_results.verification_method: git ls-files run in each repo for target file categories
success_criteria_results.details: 8 of 12 repos fully clean. 4 repos have hook-blocked residual workflow UUIDs: knowledge-system-qijie (2 files), multi-asset-portfolio (10 files), travel-planner (4 files). application-assistant git index is clean but physical files remain on disk. Gitignore patterns are correct in all repos — residual tracked files are hook-blocked manual steps.
success_criteria_results.evidence: git ls-files output: knowledge-system-qijie shows 2 workflow UUIDs; multi-asset-portfolio shows 10 workflow UUIDs; travel-planner shows 4 workflow UUIDs. All other repos: 0 transient files in index.

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: 删除截图和临时文件 (delete screenshots and temp files)
success_criteria_results.criterion: Screenshot PNGs/JPGs and .bak files are deleted from disk; .playwright-mcp contents removed
success_criteria_results.verification_method: ls at repo roots; git ls-files for tracked screenshots
success_criteria_results.details: budget-management root: 0 PNG/JPG (deleted). travel-planner screenshots: deleted. happy: bun.lock, package-lock.json, debug PNG deleted. rednote-mcp: stderr files deleted. multi-asset-portfolio: 8 qa-*.png still on disk (untracked from git index but physical deletion blocked by hook). application-assistant: null/ dir and 4 root files still on disk (git index clean, physical deletion blocked by hook).
success_criteria_results.evidence: ls *.png *.jpg at budget-management: 'No such file'. ls /root/happy/bun.lock: 'No such file'. ls /root/multi-asset-portfolio/qa-*.png: 8 files listed. ls /root/application-assistant/null/: directory exists.

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: ignore不需要备份/公开的文件 (ignore files that don't need backup/public exposure)
success_criteria_results.criterion: .gitignore patterns added for workflow-*.json, .codex, .playwright-mcp/, *.png/jpg where applicable
success_criteria_results.verification_method: git check-ignore -v for each newly-added pattern in each repo
success_criteria_results.details: All gitignore patterns confirmed via git check-ignore in all 12 repos. Patterns working correctly: workflow-*.json (knowledge-system, knowledge-system-qijie, multi-asset-portfolio, travel-planner, excel-analyzer), .codex (orchestra, multi-asset-portfolio, rednote-mcp), .playwright-mcp/ (multi-asset-portfolio, budget-management, travel-planner, happy), *.png/*.jpg (budget-management, travel-planner), docs/ (dot-claude), INDEX.md (rednote-mcp), .claude/settings.local.json (excel-analyzer), null/ and root data files (application-assistant).
success_criteria_results.evidence: git check-ignore -v confirmed each pattern with line numbers in each .gitignore file.

root_cause_verification.rationale: Root causes addressed: (1) .gitignore patterns updated with wildcard workflow-*.json pattern across all repos with the old workflow-current.json pattern; (2) git rm --cached run for all identified tracked transient files except where blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh. The hook blockage is a tooling constraint, not an implementation oversight — patterns are correct.

build_verification.skip_reason: Non-UI config task. All changes are .gitignore file edits and git index operations. No deployed code changed. BA spec confirms: 'non-UI -- config; cycle does not produce rendered UI changes, browser interaction, Playwright invocation, screenshot evidence, or any change to user-triggered code paths'.

regression_test_results.details: git ls-files data/decisions/ returns 3 files — non-regenerable arbiter decisions preserved as required.
Gitignore still has !learning-materials/_templates/, !knowledge-base/_templates/, !knowledge-base/_taxonomy/, !chats/_templates/, !.claude/ entries. Verified by confirmed patterns in gitignore check.
Gitignore check for dist/ in rednote-mcp not blocked — dist/ remains intentionally tracked.
charts/ not added to multi-asset-portfolio .gitignore per architect constraint.

regression_test_results.test: knowledge-system staging area contains only deletions
regression_test_results.details: git diff --cached --name-status shows only D (deleted) entries — all 845 staged changes are untracking operations, not additions of private data.

e2e_enforcement.blocking_reason: This cycle makes exclusively .gitignore file edits and git index operations (git rm --cached). BA spec explicitly states: 'non-UI -- config; cycle does not produce (1) rendered UI changes, (2) browser interaction, (3) Playwright invocation, (4) screenshot evidence, or (5) any change to user-triggered code paths.' There is no app, no server, no port, and no user-facing code path to test. E2E verification has no applicable target.

all_findings.issue: 2 workflow UUID files still tracked in git index: workflow-669daa0b-ed02-45b5-ad07-ef974bc317de.json, workflow-b6545738-3f96-4fd0-b193-3fe413a260d9.json. git rm --cached blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook.
10 workflow UUID files still tracked in git index. git rm --cached blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook.
4 workflow UUID files still tracked in git index: workflow-0e35f08c, workflow-32d47198, workflow-d3bf2777, workflow-dacbe96c. git rm --cached blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook.

8 qa-*.png files still on disk (qa-happy-8097-new-page.png, qa-happy-after-auth.png, qa-happy-root-page.png, qa-iter2-dev-smoketest-session.png, qa-iter2-session-view.png, qa-iter3-dev-smoketest-session.png, qa-iter3-session-view.png, qa-iter8-session-view.png). Physical deletion blocked by hook. Already untracked from git index.
null/ directory and 4 root files (education_details, experience_details, projects, skills) still on disk. Physical deletion blocked by hook. Git index is already clean (staged as D).
all_findings.recommendation: Run manually: rm -rf /root/application-assistant/null/ && rm /root/application-assistant/education_details /root/application-assistant/experience_details /root/application-assistant/projects /root/application-assistant/skills  NOTE: confirm education_details can be safely deleted — data/education_details does not exist in data/ directory.

all_findings.issue: data/education_details does not exist in data/ directory. Root-level education_details has no confirmed canonical duplicate in data/. Deleting removes it entirely.
all_findings.recommendation: User should verify if education_details content is needed before running rm.

node_modules/ (0), chats/ (0), learning-materials/ (0), knowledge-base/ (0), workflow UUIDs (0) all untracked. 845 staged deletions pending commit. Staging area is correct (all D entries). No private data additions.
